docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $509.88 FILED BY MAJOR LEGAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT BARTH & CHAPMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-1997 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
